result:
The cleaned and preprocessed dataset has been successfully generated and saved as 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'. The file contains the following variables:
- NSID (cohort member identifier)
- eth_consolidated (consolidated ethnicity variable)
- eth14 (ethnicity at age 14)
- eth15 (ethnicity at age 15)
- eth17 (ethnicity at age 17)
- eth23 (ethnicity at age 23)
- eth32 (ethnicity at age 32)

The dataset is ready for further analysis.
